$comment: Mock validation: the REAL GnuCOBOL binary as 'legacy' vs the Node mock as 'modern' — the harness verifies its own test double. Run with --layer B (curated cases) and --layer A (generated cases). Any divergence is a defect in the mock, and quantifies exactly how far mock-based results can be trusted on machines without Docker.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 PAYROLL (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-payroll)
